Hero.imageAlt: Alumni networking and connecting at professional event
Hero.description: Connect with graduates, entrepreneurs, and professionals across sectors. Build your network, find mentors, and unlock opportunities.

Footer.tagline: Empowering graduates, entrepreneurs, and professionals through networking, mentorship, and opportunities.

JoinToday.imageAlt: Alumni networking and connecting at professional event
JoinToday.description: Join 10,000+ alumni who are networking, learning, and growing together in the STP community.

network.title: Build Your Professional Network
network.desc: Connect with alumni across 50+ industries worldwide. Filter by sector, location, and skills to find the perfect connections for your career goals.

growth.title: Connect & Grow Together
growth.desc: Access exclusive masterclasses, structured courses, and mentorship programs. Upskill with content created by industry experts and fellow alumni..

opportunities.title: Discover Opportunities
opportunities.desc: Explore the alumni marketplace to buy, sell, and partner. Showcase your products and services to a trusted community of professionals.

Login.title: Login
Login.subtitle: Use the credentials sent to your email to access your account
